summary: AI call assistant that screens unknown calls and explains caller intent before pickup.
editor_note: Call screening is not new, but India makes it harder: delivery calls, finance spam, and code-mixed speech all collide on one phone. Equal AI shows Android call answering, live transcripts, quick replies, recordings, 10+ languages, and 300K daily active users. Unlike caller-ID apps that only name the number, the bet is to make the phone conversation itself inspectable before you join.

product_evidence.claim: The Google Play listing describes Equal AI as an AI call assistant that picks up, speaks, and screens unknown calls for the user.
The Google Play listing describes live call-screening transcripts, caller-intent summaries, one-tap joining, typed messages read by the assistant, full recordings, and post-call summaries.
TechCrunch reports the app has more than one million monthly active users, more than 300,000 daily active users, and support for over 10 languages.

market_context.primary_user: Indian smartphone users deciding whether to answer unknown delivery, finance, work, and marketing calls.
market_context.differentiation: Equal AI moves beyond caller ID by holding the first part of the conversation, exposing transcript and intent before the user joins.
market_context.why_now: The Series B gives the company capital to expand a consumer voice assistant that already has meaningful daily usage in a call-heavy local market.

risks.claim: The product still has to prove it can defend privacy expectations and keep call-handling quality high as it expands beyond unknown-number screening.
risks.basis: VentureDex editorial assessment based on official product evidence, Google Play copy, and TechCrunch's note that known-number screening and paid tiers remain planned.
